title: 🚀 Major Loading Fix & Brand New DevDuo Apps Hub! (v11.4.0) 📱
message: We have crushed a frustrating loading bug that was causing the app to freeze up on launch, and we are incredibly excited to introduce the all-new DevDuo Apps Hub directly into your settings workspace!
points: ✨ Launch Freeze Completely Fixed: Resolved a critical issue where the app would sometimes stop responding and get stuck on a dark loading screen when trying to open files or AI variations.
🌐 Brand New Apps Hub: Added a beautiful, dedicated space inside your settings menu where you can explore our full, growing ecosystem of tailored developer modules and offline utility apps.
🚀 Full Card Gestures: Made the entire Ecosystem Hub promotional banner completely clickable, allowing you to quickly open the storefront with a simple tap anywhere on the card.
📶 Smarter Network Recoveries: Improved our offline detection loops so if your internet drops during a sync or download, the screen cleanly unlocks and gives you a clear 'Retry' layout.

title: 🤖 Flawless AI Injection & Compiler Keyboard Fix! (v11.3.0) ⌨️
message: We have crushed two major productivity blocks in our Compiler Tab workspace! AI-generated creations now snap smoothly into place, and keyboard panel switching has been fully synchronized.
points: 🤖 Instant AI Code Population: Fixed a state selection loop where code generated by the DevDuo AI Assistant failed to inject itself into the Compiler Tab text container block automatically.
⌨️ Keyboard Toggle Restored: Resolved a workspace visibility breakdown that caused the structural action strip toolbar to collapse entirely when shifting focus to your system input panel.
⚡ Seamless Canvas Synchronization: Polished text controller hooks to immediately accept large external script blocks and accurately retain structural code highlights during runtime updates.

title: ✨ Real-Time Undo/Redo Fix & Performance Boost! (v11.2.0) 🛠️
message: We've rolled out a highly requested productivity patch! Writing and modifying files is now smoother than ever with completely repaired history workflows and faster UI rendering.
points: 🔄 Real-Time Undo & Redo Fix: Resolved a state synchronization bug where keypress changes made in Edit Mode failed to immediately update the history tracking stacks. You can now reliably reverse or redo edits at a moment's notice!
⚡ Snappier Layout Engine: Optimized layout measuring trees and eliminated background render flexibility overflows in the Settings sheet panels for fluid scrolling across all mobile screen sizes.
🐛 Stability & Bug Sweeps: Hardened compiler exception hooks and refined full-screen layout context routing to ensure an uninterrupted, high-performance coding workspace.

title: ✨ Web Preview Fixed & Free Access Restored! (v11.1.2) 🌐
message: Good news! We discovered and completely resolved an issue where our Live Web Preview module was accidentally locked behind Premium screens. It is now free for all users!
points: 🌐 Free Web Preview Restored: We stripped the premium block from our HTML/CSS viewer. All users can now run and inspect their web layouts instantly for free up to 3 times every day!
⚡ Optimized Action Routing: Cleaned up background asset hooks to ensure ads play predictably with no consecutive screen stacking loops or layout crashes.
📅 Reliable Quota Engine: Enhanced our internal database time-tracking comparisons to ensure your free daily runs automatically refresh as soon as the clock ticks past 12:00 AM midnight.

title: ⚠️ Mandatory Update Required: On-Device AI & Smart Download Guard! (v11.1.1) 🧠
message: We heard you! We completely rebuilt our on-device AI downloading and memory systems to make local coding 100% stable, loophole-free, and glitch-resistant.
points: ⏸️ Smart Pause & Resume: Pause your on-device model downloads at any time and pick up right where you left off without losing progress.
🛡️ Network Drop Protection: Advanced socket error handling automatically transitions to a safe paused state during internet drops—no more download resets!
🧼 Dynamic RAM Cleanup: Local AI models now initialize instantly on-demand and wipe themselves from memory the moment they finish generating code to keep your device lightning fast.
🎯 Absolute Footprint Sync: Realigned all internal path mappings so previously downloaded or updated models are recognized instantly by the C++ engine without deadlocks.

title: A Reimagined Workspace: Custom Overlays & Pro Tools! (v11.0.0) 🎨
message: We have completely remade the DevDuo customization engine. From custom image backdrops to embedded web debugging and smart tag matching, v11.0.0 is the most personal IDE experience yet.
points: 🖼️ Custom Background Overlays: Set any image from your gallery as your editor backdrop with adjustable opacity and darkness levels for total immersion.
🌈 Visual Color Spectrum Picker: Ditch the hex codes—use our new interactive RGB slider matrix to build your exact background color signature.
🌐 Pro Web Debugging: Integrated the powerful Eruda Console into Web Preview, allowing real-time inspection and logging for your HTML/JS projects.
🚀 Intelligent Productivity: Added HTML Auto-Closing Tag logic, a Go-To-Line navigation panel, and a distraction-free Full Screen toggle button.
☀️ Refined Aesthetics: Brand new light-mode support across all syntax highlighters and app themes for a clean, professional coding experience.

title: GitHub Profile Support & Resilient AI Downloads! (v10.4.1) 🚀
message: Manage cloud repos and download offline intelligence models with absolute stability! This version introduces complete GitHub workspace modules and an upgraded, drop-proof local AI extraction pipeline.
points: 🌐 Native GitHub Integration: Authenticate your GitHub personal tokens to search, browse, and switch repositories cleanly. Free users can link 1 profile module, while Elite users enjoy unlimited multi-account syncing.

🧠 Resilient AI Downloads: Upgraded the local model download architecture with strict drop-guards. Downloads now gracefully catch network socket dropping, keeping your screen awake to prevent silent background resets.

📡 Signal Stability Desk: Added a proactive network diagnostic panel within the AI sheet, offering hotspot setup tips and an instant error-reporting diagnostic link to our dev team if a connection is lost.
⚡ Fixed Stream Exceptions: Eliminated background platform stream de-activation crashes when clearing profile memory banks out of local sandbox directories.

title: Native GitHub Workspaces & Multi-Account Sync! (v10.4.0) 🌐
message: Bring your cloud repositories straight to your pocket! You can now authenticate your GitHub PAT, view your remote workspaces, cleanly separate multiple profile modules, and clear offline cache pools.
points: 🌐 Cloud Code Sync: Securely connect your GitHub Personal Access Tokens to search, browse, and switch repositories natively inside the app pipeline.
🏷️ Multi-Workspace Profiles: Create distinctive workspace tags to organize different accounts or scopes without data collisions or crossover leaks.
🧹 Cache & Space Control: Safely mount remote trees or clear individual repository offline storage sandboxes in a tap to keep local spaces organized.
🛡️ Ironclad Reliability: Upgraded internal structural verification checks to handle complex background integrations smoothly with zero app lag.

title: Better Support & Bug Reporting! (v10.3.12) 🛠️
message: We've upgraded our support tools to help you faster! You can now easily send us screenshots or report AI download errors directly to our development team.
points: 🐛 Smart Bug Reports: If an offline AI model fails to download, you can now report it instantly. The app automatically attaches the exact error log so we can fix it fast!
📎 Media Attachments: Have a screenshot or screen recording of an issue? Our new feedback form includes a quick button to email us your media directly.
✨ UI Polish: Enhanced the feedback and support sheets with clean, glass-morphic design improvements.
⚙️ Under the Hood: Minor bug fixes and stability improvements to keep your coding environment running smoothly.

title: Lightning Fast Performance & Stability! (v10.3.11) 🚀
message: We've completely overhauled our engine! The app now launches instantly and handles opening massive code files without freezing. Enjoy a much smoother, crash-free coding experience.
points: ⚡ Instant Launch: Eliminated startup freezing. Background systems are now delayed to ensure the app opens instantly so you can get right to coding.
📁 Massive File Support: Fixed screen freezing (ANR) when opening huge database dumps or minified files. Large files now load effortlessly!
🛡️ Enhanced Security & Stability: Improved the core logic of our free limits, ad loading, and premium systems to ensure fair usage and zero crashes.
⚙️ Core Optimizations: Background API compilers and UI rendering threads have been highly optimized to prevent lag and save battery.

title: Share Beautiful Code Snippets! (v10.3.10) 📸
message: The highly requested Code Beautifier is here! You can now turn your code into stunning, shareable images directly from your editor. Update now to access 15+ premium themes and custom export tools.
points: 📸 Code to Image: Export your scripts as beautiful, high-resolution images ready for social media.
🎨 15+ Stunning Themes: Show off your code with macOS, Cyberpunk, Synthwave, Hacker Terminal, and Dracula styles.
⚙️ Total Control: Adjust font sizes, custom widths, word wrapping, and transparent backgrounds.
🛡️ Stability Enhancements: Improved compiler memory handling and faster ad load times for a smoother experience.

title: Critical Startup & AI Crash Fixes (v10.3.9) 🛠️
message: Thank you to everyone who reported the recent issues! We have completely resolved the 'blank screen' bug during app launch and fixed the AI engine crashes on older devices. Update now for a smooth, crash-free coding experience.
points: 🐛 Blank Screen Fix: Resolved a major issue that caused the app to hang on a blank screen during startup for some users.
🛡️ AI Crash Prevention: Added intelligent hardware checks. The Local AI Engine will now safely fall back to Cloud AI on unsupported devices without crashing the app.
⚡ Improved Launch Reliability: Enhanced the splash screen and background initialization sequence to guarantee you get into your workspace flawlessly.

title: Critical Stability Fix & Bug Resolution (v10.3.8) 🚨
message: This update delivers a crucial fix for a major bug that was impacting core functionality during code execution. We strongly require updating to ensure a stable, reliable, and uninterrupted coding experience.
points: 🐛 Critical Bug Fix: Resolved a major issue that was causing failures and instability during code execution workflows.
🛡️ Improved Reliability: Fixed unexpected interruptions and ensured smoother operation across all core IDE features.
⚡ Performance Enhancements: Optimized execution handling for faster response times and reduced system strain.
⚙️ Stability Improvements: Strengthened internal processes to prevent crashes and improve overall consistency.

title: Unlimited On Device AI & Smart Fallback (v10.3.6) 🚀
message: Our Cloud AI is currently experiencing unusually high demand. To continue coding with zero limits, please switch to our 100% Offline On-Device AI models! They are much more powerful than the cloud, completely secure, and provide infinite usage.
points: 🚀 Cloud AI Demand & Smart Fallback: Due to high demand on our Cloud servers, we've added intelligent alerts that guide you seamlessly to our more powerful offline models.

♾️ Unlimited & Powerful On-Device AI: Easily switch to our 100% Offline On-Device AI models directly from the AI Configuration menu. They are much more powerful and offer infinite, uninterrupted coding assistance.
🔒 Enhanced Privacy & Security: Because these models run entirely on your hardware, they are completely secure. Zero data leaves your device.
⚙️ Stability & Performance: Under-the-hood stability improvements for local model memory allocation and offline engine booting.

title: Cloud AI Transparency Update (v10.3.5) 💡
message:
Due to high server costs, Cloud AI has strict daily usage limits for BOTH Free and Premium users.

To bypass these limits and get unlimited AI access, you can download a 100% free Offline Model in the AI Config menu, or connect your own personal Gemini API key (standard Google API pricing applies to you).
points: ℹ️ Cloud AI Notice: Added clear information explaining that Cloud AI has strict daily usage limits for both Free and Premium users due to high server costs.
🔓 100% Free Offline AI: Bypassing limits is easy! Download any of our local On-Device models for completely free, unlimited, and private coding.
🔑 Custom API Keys: Prefer the cloud? You can now easily bypass quotas by connecting your own personal Gemini API key (standard Google API pricing applies to you).
✨ UI Improvements: Enhanced the AI Configuration menu layout for better readability and a smoother setup experience.

title: Mobile Limitations Guide (v10.3.4) 📱
message: We've added a new dedicated section to clarify how mobile environments differ from desktop IDEs, helping you better manage your multi-file web projects and background execution tasks.
points: ℹ️ New 'Mobile Limitations' guide available in the Editor Actions drawer.
📝 Clear explanations regarding single-file execution requirements and mobile sandboxing restrictions.
🛠️ Useful guidance for correctly formatting CSS/JS in HTML web previews.
⚙️ General stability and performance improvements across the IDE.

title: Premium Sync & Restore Fix (v10.3.3) 💎
message: We've resolved an issue preventing some users from restoring their premium purchases on new devices. Update now to easily sync your DevDuo Elite access across all your Android devices!
points: 🛒 Restore Purchase Fix: Resolved a bug where the 'Restore Purchases' button was unresponsive for users switching devices or reinstalling.
🔄 Account Syncing: Successfully sync your DevDuo Elite or Pro access across multiple devices using the same Google Play account.
✨ UI Improvements: Added clearer status messages and visual feedback when verifying your premium status.

title: File Organization & Version Control (v10.3.2) 📁
message: We've improved the way your files and AI updates are organized! Enjoy a cleaner workspace with nested revisions, enhanced version control, and smoother navigation across the app.
points: 🗂️ Organized File Explorer: AI-generated updates and Playground revisions are now neatly organized into a subfolder hierarchy under their original parent file.
🗑️ Advanced Version Control: You can now easily delete specific subfolder updates directly within the AI Playground and Editor tabs.
⚙️ Under-the-Hood Improvements: Enhanced database initialization for a smoother onboarding experience for new users.

title: AI Project Playground & Smart Input (v10.3.1) 🏗️
message: Step into the future of mobile development! Architect full projects, manage complex folder structures, and use AI to intelligently detect inputs for a seamless coding experience. Build faster and code smarter with DevDuo Apps.
points: 🏗️ AI Project Playground: Create structured projects with manual folder and file management. Generate or update code using AI and organize your entire system in one workspace.
🧠 AI Input Detection: Effortlessly scan your code to detect required inputs and automatically generate custom fields for accurate program execution.
📸 Version Snapshots: Manage file versions with snapshots to branch your code and revert to previous states without losing progress.
🎨 Premium UI & Experience: A completely redesigned mesh-gradient interface with fluid animations and smoother performance for large files.
🛠️ Workspace Improvements: Enhanced editor experience with keyboard overscroll support and precise controls for managing your AI workspaces.

title: Critical AI Fix & Memory Control (v10.2.0) 🚀
message: We have completely overhauled the AI engine to fix startup crashes! We also introduced a new Hardware Allocation feature, giving you full control over the AI's memory usage. Please update to enjoy a flawless, blazing-fast offline coding experience.
points: 🚨 Critical AI Fix: Resolved the engine initialization crashes. All Local AI models now boot and run perfectly!
🎛️ New Hardware Allocation: Control the AI's token memory limit directly in settings to match your device's RAM (Supports 4GB up to 12GB+).
🚀 Multimodal Engine: Full support added for the new Gemma 4 (.litertlm) engine for smarter, faster code generation.
⚡ Performance Boost: Significant under-the-hood optimizations for faster compile times and a smoother UI.

title: Massive Price Drop & AI Boost (v10.1.7) 🎉
message: We've significantly reduced our Premium prices! Unlock the Elite tier for less. Plus, DevDuo Lite, Standard, and High Power models are now faster and more stable for a flawless offline AI experience.
points: 📉 Massive Price Drop: Elite Premium is now more affordable than ever!
⚡ AI Enhancements: Faster responses, better memory optimization, and improved stability.
⚙️ System Improvements: Smoother file handling, navigation, and editor performance.
🛠️ Fixes: Resolved AI startup issues and applied general bug fixes.

title: Instant AI Initialization (v10.1.5) ⚡
message: We've resolved a critical issue preventing offline AI models from booting correctly when opening the app. Your local AI is now instantly ready to code whenever you are!
points: ✅ Fixed a bug where the AI engine failed to start on the first launch.
🚀 Improved memory allocation for faster, crash-free cold starts.
🛡️ Under-the-hood stability and performance improvements.

title: Critical AI Fixes (v10.1.3) 🛠️
message: We've resolved the download and initialization issues for the offline AI engines! Important: If you use the Standard or High Power models, please delete and re-download them in the AI Configuration menu.
points: ✅ Fixed offline AI model downloads and stability.
⚠️ Action Required: Re-download Standard/High Power models to apply fixes.
💬 Fixed missing AI chat responses in the editor.
✨ UI polish and smoother animations.

title: Limitless AI Update (v10.1.0) 🚀
message: Take your coding to the next level with our brand new Smart Debugger and Magic Inputs. Update now to unlock these powerful tools!
points: 🧠 On-Device AI with offline support, no limits, and full privacy.
🛠️ Smart AI Debugger for instant error explanation and auto-fix.
📑 AI Sub-Tabs to keep your file workspace clean and organized.
🪄 Magic Input Detection for automatic stdin handling.
🔄 Easily switch between Cloud AI and Local AI on the fly.

title: A Massive Leap Forward (v10.0.0) ✨
message: Experience the next generation of development with our biggest update yet. 100% Offline AI is finally here.
points: 📱 DevDuo Lite - Ultra-fast & lightweight (4GB RAM).
⚡ DevDuo Standard - Balanced performance (6GB RAM).
🔥 DevDuo High Power - Advanced reasoning (8GB+ RAM).
🔒 Run fully offline with zero internet dependency and absolute privacy.
